title: Tosca
subtitle: Giacomo Puccini
description: Puccini's iconic verismo opera at Teatro dell'Opera di Roma. The opera famously premiered here in 1900. New season run.

title: Madama Butterfly
subtitle: Giacomo Puccini
description: Puccini's Madama Butterfly returns to Teatro dell'Opera di Roma. Conductor and cast announced closer to opening.

title: Giselle
subtitle: Adolphe Adam — Corps de ballet del Teatro dell'Opera di Roma
description: The romantic ballet at Teatro dell'Opera di Roma. Choreography after Marius Petipa.

title: Sei personaggi in cerca d'autore
subtitle: Luigi Pirandello
description: Pirandello's metatheatrical masterpiece at Teatro Argentina. A theater company is interrupted by six characters demanding their story be told.
